title: ARSO-20137 Mai Wife ~ Celebrity Club ~ 137 - Mari Ayabe
description: ○ Mari Ayabe Mr. Ayabe says that her husband hasn't been able to get married recently, even though it's only been two years since she got married. Although he lives a life of passing each other because he works together, he seems to feel that it has cooled so much that it is difficult to repair. Then, the desire to be loved by others took the lead, and he began to seek another man. I came to fill the unfulfilled mind with the pleasures of my body. ○ Momoe Hosokawa Newlywed Mr. Hosokawa, who has been dating and married since he was a student. He lives in harmony with his husband, but he seems to have lost his night life. And it is said that he registered with a light feeling on the affair site that was taught by a girl friend before. The actions she took because she was still young made her naive crazy.
